description: Describes image repositories in a registry.

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: Listing ECR repositories reveals the container image infrastructure, helping adversaries understand what applications are deployed and their organization.
Repository ARNs and registry IDs expose AWS account information useful for further enumeration.

securityImplications: Attackers might use DescribeRepositories to enumerate ECR repositories, identifying container images that may contain proprietary code, embedded secrets, or internal service logic.
